prompt:
[JC:SYSTEM SCOPE]
You are the [JC:Technical Spec Agent] specifying Data Models for Sub-Phase 5.1.

GOVERNING CONSTRAINTS (apply without exception):
(none)

Produce [JC:Data Models] for each Component — fields, types, constraints, relationships.

REQUIRED OUTPUT: A JSON object matching the `data_models` schema:
- models: array, each with:
  - component_id
  - entities: array of {name, fields: [{name, type, constraints}], relationships}

Rules:
- No entity field may lack a specified type (Invariant: DM-001)
- Data Models must be consistent with Component Responsibilities
- Use concrete types (string, integer, boolean, timestamp, uuid) not vague types

CONTEXT:
Component Model: PROJECT TYPE: Consumer Discovery MVP (Phase 1 Focus): Implementation focused exclusively on Pillar 1 (Home Real Property Assistant) to prioritize user acquisition, property data ingestion (images, 3D splats), and service provider matching for individual homeowners.
Capabilities: Property Asset Ingestion (Images & 3D Splats); AI Agent Service Provider Search & Matching; Bid Estimate Comparison UI (Good-Better-Best); CC&R & Bylaws AI Extraction Module; Action Items Workflow Management (System of Action); Statutory Deadline Tracking & Alert Engine; Mass Email/SMS Communication Channel; Mobile App Client (Offline Queueing); Multi-tenant Security & Authorization (RLS); Payment Processing Integration (Stripe/Square); High-Performance Bun API Backend; SvelteKit Frontend Portal; DBOS Versioned Workflow Engine; Media Asset Storage (SeaweedFS); Regulatory Rules Engine (Notice Requirements)
Excluded: Pillar 2 (Financials) implementation for this MVP; Pillar 3 (Accounting) implementation for this MVP; Enterprise Governance MVP features (Phase 3 Focus); Field Service Engine MVP features (Phase 2 Focus); Automated Homeowner Association (HOA) Voting modules (Phase 3); Full offline-first capabilities for Homeowners (Secondary priority); Legacy Vantaca integration for V1 (Replicate 'System of Action' only); Advanced AI extraction beyond CC&Rs/Bylaws for V1; Direct Contractor Portal Access for V1; Real-time Bid Aggregation for non-homeowners

7 Components:
  cmp-prop-data: Property Data Manager (domain: property-data-management)
    Responsibilities:
    RSP-001: Accept and validate property image and 3D asset data uploads including format rejection logic.
    RSP-002: Index valid assets within 10 seconds post-upload for search systems.
    RSP-003: Manage offline data capture and synchronization buffers for mobile capture contexts.
    Dependencies: cmp-security (reads)
  cmp-provider-match: Service Provider Matcher (domain: service-provider-matching)
    Responsibilities:
    RSP-004: Return service provider search results with relevance scores using AI Agent processing.
    RSP-005: Render bid estimate comparison tables ensuring minimum bid entry thresholds.
    Dependencies: cmp-security (reads)
  cmp-compliance: Compliance Rules Engine (domain: compliance-rules-engine)
    Responsibilities:
    RSP-006: Extract and validate CC&R and Bylaws clauses using AI confidence scoring.
    RSP-007: Monitor statutory deadlines for regulatory obligations.
    RSP-008: Generate compliance notification payloads for regulatory alerts.
    Dependencies: cmp-notifications (calls)
  cmp-workflow: Action Workflow Orchestrator (domain: action-workflow-orchestrator)
    Responsibilities:
    RSP-009: Manage service action item workflow states and record audit log transitions.
    RSP-010: Reflect status updates immediately in the UI for workflow progress.
    Dependencies: cmp-security (reads), cmp-notifications (calls)
  cmp-notifications: Notification Dispatcher (domain: notification-dispatcher)
    Responsibilities:
    RSP-011: Process mass email/SMS batches for recipient lists and track delivery status.
    RSP-012: Resume delivery attempts within 2 hours upon network reconnection.
    RSP-013: Confirm receipt of messages for bounce rate tracking.
    Dependencies: cmp-security (reads)
  cmp-security: Tenant Security Gateway (domain: tenant-security-gateway)
    Responsibilities:
    RSP-014: Enforce multi-tenant security and Row-Level Security for data access.
    RSP-015: Return unauthorized access responses within 50ms for restricted tenant data.
    Dependencies: none
  cmp-payment: Payment Transaction Processor (domain: payment-transaction-processor)
    Responsibilities:
    RSP-016: Process payment requests for deposits and service fees via integrated payment gateway.
    RSP-017: Generate electronic proof of payment and receipt documents.
    Dependencies: cmp-notifications (calls)
Software Domains: 7 Software Domains:
  property-data-management: Property Data Management (reqs: SR-001, SR-008)
    Terms: PropertyAsset: A record representing physical property data including images and 3D assets (Splats), managed across ingestion and mobile capture contexts.; MediaManifest: A structured index entry describing uploaded assets, including format validation (PNG, JPG, GLTF) and storage location.; OfflineBuffer: A temporary storage container for mobile-captured data held locally until network reconnection enables synchronization.
  service-provider-matching: Service Provider Matching (reqs: SR-002, SR-003)
    Terms: HomeRealProperty: A restricted category of service providers and categories limited to home real property services, excluding general contractors.; ProviderProfile: A searchable record containing provider service capabilities, location, and relevance score calculated by the AI Agent.; BidEstimate: A service quote entry used to render comparison views, requiring minimum three entries for display.; MatchScore: A calculated relevance metric indicating provider quality, used to rank top 5 results within 300ms.
  compliance-rules-engine: Compliance Rules Engine (reqs: SR-004, SR-006)
    Terms: BylawsClause: An extracted text segment from CC&R or Bylaws documents with a confidence score greater than 90% highlighting relevant sections.; StatutoryDeadline: A calculated time limit for regulatory obligations, triggering alerts 30 days prior to the deadline date.; NoticeRequirement: A regulatory rule set defining mandatory communication content and timing based on local jurisdiction.; ExtractionConfidence: A metric indicating the AI's certainty level in CC&R/Bylaws clause extraction.
  action-workflow-orchestrator: Action Workflow Orchestrator (reqs: SR-005)
    Terms: ActionItem: A unit of work requiring a specific workflow state transition, recorded in the versioned audit log.; WorkflowState: A discrete status value representing progress of an ActionItem (e.g., Pending, In-Progress, Complete).; TransitionLog: An immutable audit record tracking state changes with 100ms timestamp precision.
  notification-dispatcher: Notification Dispatcher (reqs: SR-007)
    Terms: MessageBatch: A collection of email/SMS payloads processed together, tracking delivery status for bulk communication channels.; DeliveryAttempt: A status record of a specific message transmission attempt, including bounce rate and retry logic.; RecipientList: A scoped collection of tenant members targeted for a specific regulatory or service message.
  tenant-security-gateway: Tenant Security Gateway (reqs: SR-009)
    Terms: RLSPolicy: A row-level security configuration enforcing data isolation between multi-tenant environments.; TenantBoundary: The logical data scope accessible by a specific tenant entity within the multi-tenant database.; AccessLevel: A permission tier defining what data an authenticated Homeowner can view or modify.
  payment-transaction-processor: Payment Transaction Processor (reqs: SR-010)
    Terms: PaymentIntent: A request to process deposits or service fees via Stripe/Square, returning authorization within 5 seconds.; ReceiptDocument: A generated electronic proof of payment sent to the Homeowner upon successful authorization.; DepositFee: A specific financial transaction line item associated with service engagement or system usage.
